schema.description: An auto-correction applied to a field value before or after validation

ruleId.description: Unique identifier for this rule within the spec

field.description: Name of the field to correct

value.description: Correction parameter (e.g. default value, replacement string, pad character)

applyOrder.description: Execution order when multiple corrections apply to the same field (lower = first)

schema.title: CorrectionRule
